title: Release v9.0 — 2026-05-02
text:
# Flowdesk Release v9.0 (2026-05-02)

## New
- Shipped **Custom dashboard widgets** in Dashboards. This directly addresses top customer requests.
## Fixed
- Resolved Dashboards performance issues affecting Enterprise accounts.
- Fixed webhook delivery reliability.

## Impact
Early data shows Dashboards support tickets down after this release.
